</model>

<extendElementProperty name="fd_appr_org" label="申请单位" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgElement" notNull="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_ORG|ORG_TYPE_DEPT);" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_appr_dept" label="申请部门" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgElement" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentDept()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_ORG|ORG_TYPE_DEPT);" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_approver" label="F申请人" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgElement" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentUser()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_PERSON);" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_phone" label="联系电话 " type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_seal_reason" label="用印事由" type="String" length="" /> <extendSubTableProperty name="fd_3246294b5671a0" label="明细表1" > <idProperty><generator type="assigned" /></idProperty> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_detail_name" label="文件名称" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_detail_copy" label="份数" type="String" length="200" /> </extendSubTableProperty>
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_seal_type" label="用印类型" enumValues="公章|gz;法人章|frz;签字章|qzz;亲笔签字|qbqz;合同章|htz" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_is_htz" label="是否开具介绍信" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSubTableProperty name="fd_3251f5d1a568aa" label="合同章明细表" > <idProperty><generator type="assigned" /></idProperty> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_name" label="合同（协议）名称" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_money" label="合同金额（万元）" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_currency" label="币种" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_copy" label="合同份数" type="Double" length="10" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_number" label="合同编号" type="String" length="200" /> </extendSubTableProperty>
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_copy_type" label="需提供的相关资质复印件" enumValues="营业执照|A;组织机构代码|B;税务登记证|C;法人身份证|D;开户许可证|E" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_copy_other_type" label="需提供的相关资质复印件其他" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_is_jsx" label="是否开具介绍信1" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_intro_type" label="是否开具公司介绍信" enumValues="是|yes;否|no" type="String" formula="true" defaultValue="$fd_is_htz$ .equals('否' ) " /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_intro_org" label="前往单位" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_intro_name" label="办理人姓名" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_intro_reason" label="办理事由" type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_comments" label="备注" type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_seal_date" label="实际用印日期" type="Date" formula="true" defaultValue="DateTimeFunction.getNow()" />
</model>

<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_yylx2_row" label="3154" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_39450a4209645e" label="用印公司类型" notNull="true" enumValues="股份公司|gfgs;总公司|zgs" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_btype_value" label="用印公司类型12" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_tr_row" label="123" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_seal_type" label="用印类型：股份公司" notNull="true" enumValues="公章|gz;法人章|frz;签字章|qzz;亲笔签字|qbqz;合同章|htz" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_ys_row" label="456" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_39450ab416c842" label="用印类型： 总 公 司" notNull="true" enumValues="公章|gz;法人章|frz;签字章|qzz1;亲笔签字|qbqz1" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_is_htz" label="是否开具介绍信" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSubTableProperty name="fd_3251f5d1a568aa" label="合同章明细表" > <idProperty><generator type="assigned" /></idProperty> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_name" label="合同（协议）名称" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_money" label="合同金额（万元）" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_currency" label="币种" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_copy" label="合同份数" type="Double" length="10" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_number" label="合同编号" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> </extendSubTableProperty>
